title: agastache pallidiflora var. greenei
intro: Agastache pallidiflora var. greenei, also known as Greene's hummingbird mint, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues and wounds. The health benefits of Agastache pallidiflora var. greenei include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and colds, and providing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for easy incorporation into a healthy lifestyle.
